rajiveutils 1.0
  • Reference

Vectorized OLS F-statistics for simple linear regression

Source: R/jackstraw.R
ols_f_stat_matrix.Rd

For every row of Y_t (each feature), compute the F-statistic for feature ~ x + 1 in a single matrix operation. Constant rows (zero variance) return NA.

Usage

ols_f_stat_matrix(Y_t, x)

Arguments

Y_t

d x n numeric matrix; features are rows, observations are columns.

x

length-n numeric vector of predictor values (joint scores for one component).

Value

length-d numeric vector of F-statistics (NA for constant rows).

On this page
